title: Carmen C81205ORG Titan Men’s Cordless 4-in-1 Multi-Groomer Set with Precision Trimmer, 5 Lock Fit Guide Combs, Removable/Washable Heads, Storage Stand and 100-Minute Rechargeable Battery, Orange

features: ESSENTIAL MALE GROOMING KIT: this all-in-one Orange Titan multi-groomer set includes 4 interchangeable heads - precision trimmer, nose trimmer, foil shaver and detail trimmer, complete with 5 guide combs to give you a professional home cut

LONG-LASTING, PREMUIM PERFORMANCE: the electric shaver’s cutting blades are made from top quality stainless steel, providing long-lasting sharpness and premuim performance to give you a pristine finish
PRECISION TRIMMING FOR THE ULTIMATE STYLE: take better control of your shave like never before by creating fine lines, contours and precise definition with the precision trimmer, make your own style

EFFORTLESS NOSE AND EAR HAIR REMOVAL: this cordless shaver includes a nose and ear hair trimmer attachment, which makes removing unwanted hairs effortless, accurate and pain-free, not a watery eye in sight
3 YEAR ASSURANCE: Comes with a standard 1 year assurance, with an additional 2 years added once you register the product online
description: Product Description The Carmen men’s Orange Titan cordless 4-in-1 multi-groomer set has all the essential tools you need to shave your head, face and body hair in your own style. This cordless shaver features 4 attachments, including a precision trimmer, nose trimmer, foil shaver and detail trimmer, complete with 5 comb guides that just click into place with a simple lock fit system. Each are specially designed to take on a variety of your grooming needs. The attachments lock into place using magnets so you can easily swap between heads. It features top quality stainless steel cutting blades, providing long-lasting sharpness and premuim performance to give you a pristine finish. The precision trimmer allows you to create defined lines, contours and intricate details to do your own custom style. Detail trimmer and foil shaver attachments are classic for adding finishing touches to your facial hair, while the nose trimmer provides pain-free removal of unwanted nose and ear hair. This shaver is cordless, providing 100 minutes of use from a single charge, making it the optimal travel companion and for keeping your bathroom free from cables. The convenient LED indicator light lets you know when it has started and finished charging. The attachment heads are removable and washable to easily clean and maintain their quality performance. An included stand and storage tray keeps your clipper and attachments neatly together in one place to save time in your regular shaving routine. Safety Warning Always unplug the trimmer before cleaning. After use, remove and clean the heads under running water. Avoid contact with eyes and skin. Do not use on infants or children. Always supervise use by minors.
